close_reason: # Errors sections added to key from_uri functions; remaining getters don't fail
description:
cargo clippy -W clippy::pedantic flags 7 public functions in secretx-core for missing '# Errors' rustdoc sections and 1 for missing '# Panics':

  # Errors missing:
    SigningBackend::algorithm (lib.rs:1341)
    get_blocking (lib.rs:1416)
    plus 5 others (run with cargo clippy -W clippy::pedantic --no-deps -p secretx-core)

  # Panics missing:
    run_on_new_thread (lib.rs:1361) — calls .expect() on the scope barrier

These are docstring conventions that downstream callers will appreciate when reading the API on docs.rs. Filing as a single P4 readability bundle since the fix is mechanical.
title: Public functions returning Result/possibly panicking lack # Errors / # Panics docs
